Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Huh? Are the girls not up yet?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Man, those sleepyheads! The ocean's not gonna sit around and wait for us, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Once the sun sets, the water temperature drops, tiring you out much faster.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Huh? Uhh, I guess. That's really what you're worried about?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Didn't one of the maids give you something as we were leaving?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}One of the maids gave me a letter. Oh man, what if it's a confession of love!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 21 3 7}Ahh, it sure is tough, bein' this popular![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}It says, "We've gone to see the Jomon Cedar Tree."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}This looks like Yamagishi's handwriting.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}We're at an island resort in the middle of summer! Why aren't they going to the beach!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Whaddaya mean? I just wanted to lighten the mood yesterday.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Well, it doesn't matter now, anyways...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}This is the frontier of romance! We're bound to meet someone new out here![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}We'll call this: Operation Yakushima Beach Fling![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}You mean we're gonna pick up girls?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}How 'bout it, Sanada-san? With you on the squad, we're guaranteed to succeed![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}I should've known this was your plan.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}You're right, it does sound like a hassle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}Whaaat? Don't tell me you wanna spend the whole day with just us three![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}You two really wanna let this opportunity to enjoy our summer vacation go to waste?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}Then I'm appointing him our leader, as usual.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}You said it yourself: this is an operation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}You better take this seriously, {f 4 2}. It's an important operation.[n]{f 1 1}
